summary: Verified that lint issues (99 issues: errcheck, gocritic, ineffassign, revive, staticcheck, unparam, whitespace) reported in the quality gate are now resolved. Running golangci-lint produces 0 issues. All tests pass. No code changes were needed - the lint issues were already fixed in prior commits on this branch.
keyDecisions: Lint issues were already resolved by prior commits; this task confirmed the fix is complete.
notes: This was a fix-task to verify lint resolution. The 99 lint issues from the quality gate were already fixed in prior commits. golangci-lint now reports 0 issues. All packages compile and all tests pass (coverage 85.7%+ for internal/cmd).
